name: Crockpot Lentil-Kale Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups (about 1 lb) chopped kale or spinach or chard (tear the leaves of the kale/spinach/chard into 1/2 inch strips)
1 celery stalk, chopped (I used celery salt here)
1-2 tablespoons soy miso (soy and/or Worcestershire sauce is good, too)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a crockpot.
2. Turn to low if leaving it for a long period of time.
Mr. Altar states this serves about 4-6. I made this for me and froze the rest, so I can't really say! I can tell you this comes out very thick, almost like a stew.
